title: Game Client — Complete Interface
description: Create an RPGClient class that provides the full player experience. It wraps GameClient with display formatting methods: format_room() renders a room description with exits and items, format_combat() renders combat status, and format_inventory() renders inventory contents. Includes connect() and disconnect() that delegate to the underlying GameClient.
test_code:
client = RPGClient()
assert hasattr(client, 'connect'), 'RPGClient must have connect method'
assert callable(client.connect), 'connect must be callable'
assert hasattr(client, 'disconnect'), 'RPGClient must have disconnect method'
assert callable(client.disconnect), 'disconnect must be callable'
room = Room('Test Room', 'A test room.', {'north': 'Other', 'south': 'Another'}, ['key', 'gem'])
room_str = RPGClient.format_room(room)
assert isinstance(room_str, str), 'format_room should return a string'
assert 'Test Room' in room_str, 'format_room should include room name'
assert 'A test room.' in room_str, 'format_room should include description'
assert 'north' in room_str, 'format_room should include exit directions'
assert 'key' in room_str, 'format_room should include items'
combat_str = RPGClient.format_combat('Hero', 85, 'Goblin', 12)
assert isinstance(combat_str, str), 'format_combat should return a string'
assert 'Hero' in combat_str, 'format_combat should include player name'
assert '85' in combat_str, 'format_combat should include player health'
assert 'Goblin' in combat_str, 'format_combat should include enemy name'
assert '12' in combat_str, 'format_combat should include enemy health'
inv_str = RPGClient.format_inventory(['sword', 'potion'], 50)
assert isinstance(inv_str, str), 'format_inventory should return a string'
assert 'sword' in inv_str, 'format_inventory should include item names'
assert 'potion' in inv_str, 'format_inventory should include all items'
assert '50' in inv_str, 'format_inventory should include gold amount'
acceptance_criteria: RPGClient has connect() and disconnect() methods that delegate to GameClient
format_room() returns a string containing room name, description, exits, and items
format_combat() returns a string with player and enemy names and health values
format_inventory() returns a string listing all items and gold amount
All format methods return strings (not None)
hints: format_room: use f-strings and join() for exits and items lists
format_inventory: loop items with '- {item}', add Gold line at end
Use '\n'.join(lines) to build multi-line strings cleanly
